summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Soul Food soft launch features. All 10 test cases passed. Backend API returns correct pricing with preorder flags. Frontend displays correct banner, pricing, and merchandise badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PRODUCTS dictionary correctly has preorder:True and $3 off sale prices for all BKFT and Lunch workbooks
Frontend QuickOrder.js correctly displays Pre-Order badges on merchandise (game packs, pens, study kit) with amber buttons
Bookmarks (Set of 3 and Leather) correctly show green 'Add to Cart' buttons without Pre-Order badge
PaymentSuccess.js uses useRef for retry counter and handles 404/500 gracefully with retries
CheckoutPage.js shows '(one per order)' note next to coupon label
context_for_next_testing_agent: All soft launch features verified working. Backend API at /api/payments/products returns correct pricing with preorder flags. Frontend displays correct banner, pricing, and merchandise badges.

banner_he_is_risen.details: Banner shows 'He Is Risen! Soul Food Is LIVE!' with Holiday Available Now, Break*fast Pre-Order $3 Off, Lunch Pre-Order $3 Off

breakfast_pricing.details: AE Digital $11.99, AE Paperback $24.99, YE Digital $9.99, YE Paperback $21.99 - all with preorder=True

lunch_pricing.details: AE $24.99, YE $21.99, IE $26.99 - all with preorder=True

holiday_pricing.details: AE Digital $14.99, AE Paperback $16.99 - no preorder flag (available now)

breakfast_nibbles_snack_packs.details: Nibbles $3.99, Snack Packs $8.99 - available now (no preorder)

merchandise_badges.details: Bookmarks (Set of 3 $6.99, Leather $4.99) show green 'Add to Cart'. Pens, Study Kit, Game Packs show amber 'Pre-Order' button and badge

instructor_section.details: Holiday IE $19.99 available (no pre-order badge), Break*fast IE Digital $16.99 and Paperback $26.99 with pre-order

backend_api_products.details: breakfast_ae_digital: sale_price=11.99, preorder=True; lunch_ae_paperback: sale_price=24.99, preorder=True

payment_success_page.details: Component loads without errors. Shows 'Payment Issue - No payment session found' when accessed without session_id

checkout_coupon_note.details: Coupon section shows '(one per order)' note next to the label

frontend_ui_tests: Banner 'He Is Risen! Soul Food Is LIVE!' displayed
Bookmarks merchandise with green Add to Cart button
Game Packs with Pre-Order badge and amber button
PaymentSuccess page shows 'No payment session found'
Checkout page shows '(one per order)' coupon note
Lunch Series shows $24.99 with Pre-Order badge
Instructor Edition Holiday IE shows $19.99 with Add to Cart
